mission.title: k3s: k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting as systemd service
mission.description: k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting as systemd service. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify k3s troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your k3s deployment:
```bash
k3s --version
systemctl status k3s
journalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `code = Unavailable desc = all SubConns are in TransientFailure, latest connection error: connection error: desc = \"tran`

steps.title: Review k3s configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant k3s configuration:
```bash
k3s --version
kubectl get nodes -o wide
kubectl get pods -A
```
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

steps.title: Apply the fix for k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting…
steps.description:
https://github.com/rancher/k3s/issues/478
```yaml
May 29 21:45:08 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time="2019-05-29T21:45:08.124306382Z" level=debug msg="Wrote ping"
May 29 21:45:08 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time="2019-05-29T21:45:08.505468246Z" level=debug msg="FIXME: Got an status-code for which error does not match any expected type!!!: -1" module=api status_code=-1

May 29 21:45:13 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time="2019-05-29T21:45:13.124379839Z" level=debug msg="Wrote 
```

steps.title: Confirm k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
journalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=50 --since='5 minutes ago'
kubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `code = Unavailable desc = all SubConns are in TransientFailure, latest connection error: connection error: desc = \"tran` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/639

prerequisites.description: A running k3s cluster or a system where k3s can be installed.
